task_objective: Change the user-facing plugin name to SDH-Ludusavi while keeping the project directory and internal package identity as SDH-ludusavi/sdh_ludusavi, then merge the branch to main.
tests_added: Updated existing package/frontend/version/static tests to assert SDH-Ludusavi display and archive naming.
design_decisions: Keep the repo directory, Python import package, cache paths, and lower-case npm package name unchanged.
Rename only user-facing plugin identity surfaces: plugin metadata, archive root/zip name, visible README text, QAM title, version row, and displayed log prefixes.
results: Focused rename tests passed before full validation.
Prepared the branch for a final validation, commit, and fast-forward merge to main.
